---
title: "Lab News"
---

### 2026

[Presentation] July 2026 — Lab co-director Dr. Phillip Schmutz presented research on beach wrack, wind reduction, and sediment deposition at the [International Conference on Aeolian Research (ICAR)](https://www.geog.ox.ac.uk/events/icar2026/index.html) in Swakopmund, Namibia.

[Publication] January 2026 — Paper accepted in *Southeastern Geographer*: Space–Time Mapping and Identification of Sea Turtle Nesting Clusters on Pensacola Beach and Gulf Islands National Seashore, Florida. [https://doi.org/10.1353/sgo.0.a981639](https://doi.org/10.1353/sgo.0.a981639)
